name: IRC_AVAILABILITY_CONTEXT
description: This table is used to store the configuration data for availability context in recruiting. Each row represents a dimension value in a context.

columns.Name: OBJECT_CTX_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key - Sequence generated key. Fusion Global sequence generator is used to generate the key at run-time.

columns.Name: OBJECT_CTX_CODE
columns.Comments: Object Context Code is used for data migration purpose. This column will be populated with a GUID value to uniquely identify a row across environments

columns.Name: OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: Business Object ID - It can be CSP ID / Apply Flow ID / Content Library Id .. etc

columns.Name: OBJECT_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Business Object Type - It can be ORA_CSP or ORA_APPLY_FLOW or ORA_CONTENT_LIBRARY .. etc depends on the business object type

columns.Name: RECRUITING_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Recruiting Type Code

columns.Name: ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.Comments: Organization Id

columns.Name: GEOGRAPHY_NODE_ID
columns.Comments: Geography Node Id

columns.Name: JOB_ID
columns.Comments: Job ID

columns.Name: JOB_FAMILY_ID
columns.Comments: Job Family Id

columns.Name: JOB_FUNCTION_CODE
columns.Comments: Job Function Code

columns.Name: SITE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Career Site Number refers to IRC_CX_SITES_B.SITE_NUMBER column and defines career site dimension of availability context

columns.Name: PERSON_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Person Type Code

columns.Name: DIMENSION_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Dimension Type Code - E.g Values :  ORA_RECRUITING_TYPE , ORA_JOB_FAMILY, ORA_JOB_FUNCTION, ORA_LOCATION, ORA_ORGANIZATION, ORA_PERSON_TYPE

columns.Name: DEFAULT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Default Flag - Values are 'Y' or 'N'

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
